heading: Definitions
label: 1301 Definitions
text: As used in this chapter—The term “veteran” includes a person who died in the active military, naval, air, or space service.
notes: Amendments2021— substituted “air, or space service” for “or air service”.Pub. L. 116–2831991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 401 of this title1969— struck out par. (1) which defined “basic pay”.Pub. L. 91–96Par. (1). substituted “sections 201, 202, 203, 204, 205, or 207 of title 37” for “sections 232(a), 232(e), or 308 of Title 37”.Pub. L. 91–24

Effective Date of 1969 AmendmentAmendment by effective first day of second calendar month which begins after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 91–96section 8 of Pub. L. 91–96section 1302 of this titleOct. 27, 1969
